more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Sonja Eyes Private Jet As South Africa Court Battle Over Chivayo Assets Intensifies
more.description: [New Zimbabwe] Sonja Louise Madzikanda has approached the High Court of South Africa (Gauteng Division, Pretoria) seeking to have a luxury jet linked to her estranged husband Wicknell Munodaani Chivayo grounded.

more.title: ZERA pushes up fuel prices again
more.description: THE Zimbabwe Energy Regulatory Authority (ZERA) has once again increased the retail prices of diesel and petrol. The latest price hike for April is the third time in recent weeks since the escalation of the geopolitical tensions in the Middle East involving US, Israel and Iran resulting in the disruption of the movement of oil. [...] The post ZERA pushes up fuel prices again appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: Tax cuts on diesel avert major fuel price hike
